tool_args.label: Offset bus lane on Second Avenue

payload.description: Added offset bus lane on Second Avenue in two sections: 115th to 113th Streets and 108th to 106th Streets
Proposed First Ave curb bike lane from 49th to 57th Streets

payload.claim_text: Added 28th Street stations on First Avenue (northbound) and Second Avenue (southbound) in response to analysis of current ridership
Curbside Bicycle Lane Proposal presented to CB6 in March 2010 creates robust cycling facility on entire length of First Avenue and enhances connection to Queensboro Bridge
Water Street/Wall Street southbound SBS and local relocated to far side of Wall Street to improve hotel loading zone on Water Street
Grand Street/Allen Street southbound SBS relocated south of local between Hester and Grand Streets to reduce conflicts with truck loading and bus activity on Allen Street
First Avenue/42nd Street northbound SBS station relocated to between 43rd and 44th Streets to address United Nations security concerns

tool_args.label: 57th Street station relocated for tree impacts

payload.claim_text: 57th Street/First Avenue northbound SBS station relocated to between 57th and 58th Streets through discussion with community and elected officials to reduce street tree impacts

payload.claim_text: Construction sequencing: Working north from First Avenue and Houston Street. Milling, paving, lane markings, bus and bike lane paint. Followed by pedestrian refuge islands, overhead signs, bus shelters, fare machines.

payload.claim_text: Construction timeline: Yellow May-June from Houston St to 42 St; Orange June-July from 42 St to 67 St; Red July-August from 67 St to 79 St; Brown August-September from 79 St to 86 St; Grey No changes to street design in 2010 from 86 St to 125 St
